snapshot.title: Write mission control helper copy for puzzle actions
snapshot.description: Derived from the external creative sprint doc: write plain-language helper copy for the most confusing player actions in Saily, especially daily mission controls, archive unlocks, discuss gating, and science annotation tools.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Copy covers the primary action sets on the current mission/game surfaces
Tone is short, friendly, and low-jargon
Notes identify the target screens/components for implementation
